rule_metadata.name: koodous
rule_metadata.description: Detects samples repackaged by backdoor-apk shell script

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule koodous : official
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects samples repackaged by backdoor-apk shell script"
		Reference = "https://github.com/dana-at-cp/backdoor-apk"

	strings:
		$str_1 = "cnlybnq.qrk"

	condition:
		$str_1 and androguard.receiver ( /\.AppBoot$/ )
}
